name: prd_features
description: Product feature records with status, priority, owner, and roadmap positioning

description.description: Feature description and user problem being solved

target_segment.description: Primary user segment this feature targets

target_release.description: Target release quarter or version (e.g., Q2 2026)

shipped_at.description: Date the feature was shipped to production

name: prd_experiments
description: A/B test definitions with hypothesis, variants, metrics, and results

hypothesis.description: The hypothesis being tested (if X then Y because Z)

traffic_split_pct.description: Percentage of traffic in the test variant (e.g., 50)

lift_pct.description: Observed lift percentage of test vs control on primary metric

confidence_pct.description: Statistical confidence level of the result (0-100)

name: prd_sprints
description: Time-boxed delivery iterations with velocity, goals, and completion tracking

planned_points.description: Story points committed at sprint start

completed_points.description: Story points completed by end of sprint

carryover_points.description: Story points rolled over to the next sprint

team_capacity.description: Available team capacity in person-days for this sprint

retrospective_notes.description: Key findings from the sprint retrospective

name: prd_user_segments
description: Defined audience groups with behavioral and demographic characteristics

name.description: Segment name (e.g., Power Users, New Signups)

description.description: Who this segment represents and why it matters

size_estimate.description: Estimated number of users in this segment

defining_behaviors.description: List of behaviors that define membership in this segment

acquisition_channels.description: Primary channels through which this segment is acquired

primary_jobs_to_be_done.description: Core jobs this segment is trying to accomplish with the product

churn_risk.description: Relative churn risk level for this segment

last_reviewed.description: Date this segment definition was last reviewed and updated

name: prd_research_sessions
description: User interview and usability test records with findings and insights

participant_segment.description: User segment represented by the participant

researcher.description: Researcher or UX team member who conducted the session

research_question.description: Primary research question this session was designed to answer

key_findings.description: List of key findings from this session

pain_points_identified.description: User pain points surfaced during the session

severity.description: Severity of findings - critical sessions should trigger immediate product review

recording_url.description: Link to session recording or notes document
